title: Promo Tile Generation Flow
description: Generates the Chrome Web Store small promo tile (440x280) by building an inline SVG string, rendering it via Puppeteer headless browser, and saving the screenshot as a PNG.

activity_steps.label: Define brand constants
activity_steps.detail: Declare color constants (BG, BG_TOP, MAGENTA, TEXT, TEXT_DIM) and file paths (ROOT, OUT)

activity_steps.label: Build SVG string (renderTile)
activity_steps.detail: Construct inline SVG template literal (440x280) embedding brand colors. Includes: linearGradients (bg, slop), radialGradient (cardGlow), feGaussianBlur filter (softShadow), background rect, subtle grid lines, brand wordmark top-left, DEVTOOLS badge top-right, demo UI card with magenta outline + label tab + gradient headline + sparkle emojis, bottom tagline text

activity_steps.label: Inject HTML + SVG
activity_steps.detail: page.setContent(html) — wraps svg in minimal HTML: body 440x280, margin/padding reset, overflow hidden

activity_steps.label: Capture screenshot (saveImage)
activity_steps.detail: page.screenshot({ path: OUT, omitBackground: false }) — writes PNG to extension/icons/promo-small.png

svg_visual_layers: Background rect with vertical linear gradient (BG_TOP → BG)
Subtle grid texture (3 horizontal + 3 vertical lines, opacity 0.04)
Brand wordmark group at (28,26): icon rect + slash line + 'Impeccable' text
DEVTOOLS badge group at (338,28): pill rect + label text
Demo card group at (64,92): shadow card rect + glow overlay + sparkle emojis + gradient headline 'AI-Powered Magic' + subline + magenta outline path + label tab path + '✦ gradient text' label
Tagline text at y=244: 'Detect AI slop in any web page.'
Sub-tagline text at y=262: '24 detections · Open DevTools...'
dependencies: puppeteer — headless Chromium for SVG-to-PNG rendering
fs (Node built-in) — imported but not directly used (path resolution only via path module)
path (Node built-in) — path.resolve, path.join, path.dirname, path.relative
url (Node built-in) — fileURLToPath for ESM __dirname equivalent
key_relationships: Script reads no external files — SVG is self-contained inline template literal
Puppeteer browser is the rendering engine; page is single-use
No functions defined — all logic is top-level sequential await calls
control_flow_notes: Linear flow — no branching, no loops, no error handling (no try/catch)
All async steps use top-level await (ESM module)
Script exits naturally after browser.close() and console.log
output_artifact: extension/icons/promo-small.png (440x280 PNG, Chrome Web Store small promo tile)
